description: Linear progress feedback for known completion, sequences, and values that benefit from visual comparison.

height.description: Rendered height of the Progress Bar in device-independent pixels.

isIndeterminate.description: Shows continuous activity when true; set false to display the current value.

margin.description: Outer spacing around the Progress Bar, using WPF Thickness syntax.

maximum.description: Upper bound used to calculate the displayed progress.

minimum.description: Lower bound used to calculate the displayed progress.

value.description: Current progress value between minimum and maximum.

width.description: Rendered width of the Progress Bar in device-independent pixels.

sourceHints.usage: semantic extraction from the implicit WPF UI ProgressBar style
